name: Synthetic Event Booth fixture
description: Wholly synthetic event-booth scenario for end-to-end workflow validation. No real counterparty names, no real BOF facts, no confidential source text. This file may be loaded by the CLI harness and Playwright; it must NOT be seeded as the default UI state. See ADR-009 in docs/08_ARCHITECTURE_DECISIONS.md.

source_contents.synthetic_event_announcement.pdf: Synthetic event announcement. Event: Synthetic Industry Expo 2027. Dates: 2027-05-01 to 2027-05-03. Venue: Synthetic Convention Center, Building A. Premium booths include power, network, signage. On-site sales are not permitted. Refunds: 30 days before event 100%, 14 days 50%, after 0%. (Synthetic fixture; no real-world facts.)
source_contents.synthetic_booth_operation_guide.pdf: Synthetic operation guide. Booth setup window opens 2 days before event. Premium A includes 6 sqm, 2 chairs, table, branded backdrop. Operating hours 10:00 to 18:00. Force majeure handled per Article 9. (Synthetic fixture.)
source_contents.synthetic_quote.xlsx: Synthetic quote. Premium A booth fee: 12,000,000 KRW (VAT excluded). Includes setup, electricity, network. Optional: sponsorship upgrade 5,000,000 KRW. Payment terms: 50% on signing, 50% by 2027-04-01. (Synthetic fixture.)
source_contents.synthetic_counterparty_email.eml:
From: counterparty@synthetic.example
Subject: Booth proposal follow-up

We confirm interest in Premium A booth for the Synthetic Industry Expo 2027. Please send the entry contract for review. We expect refund flexibility for force-majeure cancellations. (Synthetic fixture.)

issue_decisions.partial_note: Acceptable with refund schedule cap at 70%
